01 · About

Self-taught AI specialist and rapid prototype builder — turning complex ideas into working software, fast.

Deep hands-on mastery of frontier AI models — Claude, Grok, and ChatGPT. Proven ability to design and ship complex, working systems independently under tight timelines.
